channel.title: GTM AI Brief
channel.description: AI news translated into GTM workflows.

item.title: GTM AI Brief: Ads, AEO, CRM Agents, and Agent Infrastructure
item.description: OpenAI is expanding ChatGPT ads with beta self-serve buying, CPC bidding, and measurement while continuing to separate sponsored content from organic answers. Demand gen teams should treat conversational ads as buyer-question capture, not just another display placement. The useful unit is the decision conversation: "what should I buy?", "which tool fits this use case?", or "how do I solve this problem?"
